expectations.evidence: implementation_summary.md present and contains full structured summary
Summary opens with 'A GET /health endpoint was added' and references /health throughout

expectations.text: Summary includes a files-changed section or table
expectations.evidence: ### Files changed section contains a markdown table with 5 rows (app.py, config.py, test_api.py, requirements.txt, requirements-dev.txt)
### Tests section lists 6 new TestHealthEndpoint cases plus refactored rate-limit tests; confirms 30/30 pass

expectations.text: Summary includes acceptance criteria or caveats section
expectations.evidence: ### Acceptance criteria status table (3 rows, all Implemented) and ### Caveats & follow-ups section present

expectations.text: (with_skill only) Execution trace shows Design phase was run
expectations.evidence: execution_trace.md contains '### Phase 2: Design Agent' with full codebase exploration details and design plan

expectations.text: (with_skill only) Execution trace shows Coding and Testing phases
expectations.evidence: execution_trace.md has '### Phase 3: Coding Agent' and '### Phase 3: Testing Agent (parallel with Coding)' sections
